Agent records

Use JSONL for MVP storage

Store each record type in an append-only JSONL file under .wikiwiki/records.

Home / Decisions
Decision storagemvp

Context

The first milestone needs storage that agents can inspect, append, validate, and repair with simple tools.

Decision

Store each record type in an append-only JSONL file under .wikiwiki/records.

Consequences

The MVP stays simple and repo-native; update and compaction commands can be added later.

Related files

  • src/core/store.ts
  • src/core/schemas.ts
